steps.title: Use the zero point to find the constant t
steps.content:
Since the graph passes through (23, 0), we have $g(23) = 0$. Substituting into the function definition:
$$g(23) = (23 + 17)(t - 23) = 0$$
$$40(t - 23) = 0$$
Because $40 \neq 0$, we must have $t - 23 = 0$, so $t = 23$.

steps.title: Evaluate g(0) with t = 23
steps.content:
Now that we know $t = 23$, the function becomes $g(x) = (x + 17)(23 - x)$. Evaluating at $x = 0$:
$$g(0) = (0 + 17)(23 - 0) = 17 \cdot 23 = 391$$
